smartConfig.title: Smart Config prompt guidance
smartConfig.description: Review the resolved prompt, copy it into your preferred AI CLI, and complete the configuration flow manually.

remoteMode.title: Remote Mode
remoteMode.description: Configure Hagicode Desktop to connect to a remote Hagicode instance instead of running a local service.

enabled.label: Enable Remote Mode
enabled.description: When enabled, the application will connect to the configured remote Hagicode instance instead of running a local service.

errors.invalidUrl: Please enter a valid HTTP/HTTPS URL
errors.urlRequired: Please enter a remote server URL

messages.saveFailed: Failed to save remote mode configuration
messages.connectionFailed: Connection test failed. Please check the URL and network connection.

notes.modeExplanation: Remote mode allows you to connect to a cloud-deployed Hagicode instance. The local service will be disabled when remote mode is active.

onboarding.title: Onboarding
onboarding.description: Re-run first-time setup wizard to reconfigure data directory, download packages, install dependencies, and start service.
onboarding.restartWizardDescription: Re-run first-time setup wizard to reconfigure data directory, download packages, install dependencies, and start service.

debug.title: Debug
debug.deprecatedNotice: Dependency-check debug options were removed. Use the homepage AI diagnosis entry for troubleshooting.
debug.ignoreDependencyCheckDescription: When enabled, all dependencies will be treated as not installed for testing purposes.

dataDirectory.title: Data Directory
dataDirectory.description: Configure and manage the data storage location for Hagicode Server.

path.label: Data Directory Location
path.placeholder: Enter the full path to the data directory

errors.invalidPath: Please select a valid data directory path before saving.

messages.restoreFailed: Failed to restore default data directory

validation.invalid: Path is invalid. Please check the error message below.

notes.absolutePathOnly: Note: Only absolute paths are supported. Relative paths are not allowed.

agentCli.title: Preferred Agent CLI
agentCli.description: Choose which CLI should be highlighted first when Desktop shows prompt guidance.

messages.saved: {{name}} is now the preferred guidance tool

notes.fallback: Prompt guidance still works without a preference; Desktop only uses this to highlight recommendations and docs.

githubOAuth.title: GitHub Integration
githubOAuth.description: Configure the GitHub OAuth Client ID and Client Secret used by the embedded web service.

clientId.label: Client ID
clientId.placeholder: Enter the GitHub OAuth Client ID
clientId.helper: Public identifier for your GitHub OAuth application.

clientSecret.label: Client Secret
clientSecret.placeholder: Enter the GitHub OAuth Client Secret
clientSecret.helper: This value is stored locally and masked automatically in environment diagnostics.

errors.clientIdRequired: Please enter the GitHub Client ID.
errors.clientSecretRequired: Please enter the GitHub Client Secret.

messages.savedRunning: GitHub OAuth settings were saved. Restart the web service to apply them.
messages.savedStopped: GitHub OAuth settings were saved and will apply the next time the web service starts.
messages.saveFailed: Failed to save the GitHub OAuth settings.
messages.clearedRunning: GitHub OAuth settings were cleared. Restart the web service to remove the active credentials.
messages.clearFailed: Failed to clear the GitHub OAuth settings.

notes.helper: Desktop injects these credentials into the embedded web service environment for the upcoming GitHub sign-in flow.
notes.restartRunning: The running web service is still using the previous GitHub OAuth credentials. Restart it before validating sign-in.
notes.restartStopped: Last saved: {{value}}. Because the web service is stopped, the new GitHub OAuth settings will apply on the next start.
notes.currentlyApplied: Last saved: {{value}}. The running web service already matches the saved GitHub OAuth settings.

footer.copyright: © 2025 Hagicode Desktop. Built with ❤️ using Electron + React + TypeScript.

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.description: Install embedded web service package and start managing your local PCode instance.

secure.title: Secure
secure.description: Built with security in mind. Your data stays on your machine.

dependencyManagement.title: Dependency Management
dependencyManagement.description: Manage embedded web service packages and system dependencies

tips.title: Tips
tips.description: Keep your dependencies up to date for best performance and security.

versionManagement.title: Version Management
versionManagement.description: Install, switch, and manage Hagicode Server versions
versionManagement.confirmUninstall: Are you sure you want to uninstall this version?
versionManagement.confirmReinstall: Are you sure you want to reinstall this package? This will delete cache and installed version, then download and install again.

noVersionsInstalled.title: No Versions Installed Yet
noVersionsInstalled.description: The easiest way to get started with Hagicode Desktop is through our guided setup wizard. Complete installation and configuration in just a few steps.

info.title: About Version Management
info.description: Version management allows you to install multiple Hagicode Server versions and switch between them. Only versions with all dependencies satisfied can be activated.

toast.switchBlocked: This package requires a newer Desktop version.

dialog.reinstallDescription: This will delete cache and installed version, then download and install again. Do you want to continue?
dialog.uninstallDescription: Are you sure you want to uninstall this version? This action cannot be undone.

dependencyInfo.title: Dependency Requirements
dependencyInfo.description: These are dependency requirements for this version. Please ensure all dependencies are installed before using this version.

desktopCompatibility.blockedTitle: Upgrade Desktop to activate this package
desktopCompatibility.upgradeGuidance: Upgrade Hagicode Desktop, then retry switching or starting this package.

aiGuidance.title: AI dependency guidance
aiGuidance.description: Use the version-specific prompt below with any supported AI CLI to install or verify dependencies.
aiGuidance.panelDescription: Desktop resolves the version prompt for you and shows the exact instructions to paste into your CLI.

portableMode.title: Portable version mode
portableMode.description: Version installation, switching, and package source management are hidden because this build runs from a packaged fixed payload.
portableMode.updates: Updates for this build are managed by the packaged distribution instead of in-app version actions.
